description: Likely removes distractor colors or extracts/recolors the relevant structure while preserving the canvas size. Removes input color(s) [1, 2, 6, 7]; output colors are a subset of input colors. Primary structural cue: color subset. Inferred transformation family: delete/extract/recolor. The rule is likely but may need pixel-level refinement.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_d23f8c26(I):
    x1 = asindices(I)
    x2 = width(I)
    x3 = halve(x2)
    x4 = matcher(last, x3)
    x5 = compose(flip, x4)
    x6 = sfilter(x1, x5)
    O = fill(I, ZERO, x6)
    return O
